output: Sending offer letter to Alex Miller...
The Answer to the Ultimate Question of Life,
You are now trapped in Vim.
Just kidding. But seriously, hire Alex. He uses VS Code.
(Type :q! to exit... oh wait, this isn't Vim.)

commandDescriptions.open: View project details with ASCII art. Usage: open <project>
commandDescriptions.run: Open project demo in browser. Usage: run <project>
commandDescriptions.man: Display manual page. Usage: man alex
commandDescriptions.which: Show the path of a command. Usage: which alex
commandDescriptions.download: Download a file. Usage: download resume
commandDescriptions.echo: Print text to terminal. Usage: echo <text>
commandDescriptions.exit: Nice try. There is no escape.
commandDescriptions.theme: Change terminal color theme. Usage: theme <name>
commandDescriptions.github: Show cached GitHub repository data. Usage: github repos
